prompt: ok so I just edited a task for a client and went back to the client list and the task count didn't update, I had to refresh the whole page, that's annoying as fuck why doesn't it just show the updated number

assertions.text: Response contains all 7 sections from the skill format
References real file paths from the codebase
Proposes exactly 3 fixes ordered by effort level
Section 6 makes a clear recommendation rather than staying neutral
Section 1 preserves the user's frustrated tone without sanitizing
